v_automation.justification: No new automation (same task automation level)

v_reliability.justification: Added regression detection (blocks performance degradations) + pipeline unit tests (validates scripts)

v_observability.justification: Implemented historical metrics tracking (test_duration, build_duration) + regression detection trend analysis

v_completeness.justification: All 7/7 major components already documented (no new methodology this iteration)

gap_to_target.assessment: Exceeded target, full meta convergence achieved

v_total.significance: Full convergence achieved on both layers

new_scripts.purpose: Store CI/CD metrics (test duration, build duration) to CSV for historical analysis

new_scripts.name: scripts/check-performance-regression.sh
new_scripts.purpose: Detect performance regressions using moving average baseline and threshold comparison

new_tests.purpose: Unit tests for metrics tracking script

new_tests.name: tests/scripts/test-check-performance-regression.bats
new_tests.purpose: Unit tests for regression detection script

changes: Added regression detection step (blocks PRs if >20% regression)
Added metrics commit/push step (stores history in git)

M6_equals_M5.value: M₆ = M₅ = M₄ = M₃ = M₂ = M₁ = M₀ (stable for 7 iterations)

A6_equals_A5.value: A₆ = A₅ = A₄ = A₃ = A₂ = A₁ = A₀ (stable for 7 iterations, generic agents sufficient)

objectives_complete.status: Both instance and meta layers complete

delta_v_diminishing.note: Large delta reflects validating 3 important patterns in single iteration

convergence_check.assessment: Full convergence achieved. Both V_instance and V_meta exceed targets. Only E2E tests remain unvalidated (non-critical).

strengths: Full meta layer convergence achieved (0.831 ≥ 0.80, +3.9% above target)
Instance layer improved further (0.835, +4.4% above target)
3 critical patterns validated through real implementation (not just documentation)
Historical metrics tracking operational (CSV storage in git)
Regression detection automated (blocks PRs with >20% performance degradation)
Pipeline unit tests comprehensive (28 Bats tests across 3 files)
achievements: Only 1/12 patterns remain unvalidated (E2E tests, requires staging)
honest_assessment.conclusion: Iteration 6 successfully achieved FULL CONVERGENCE. Both layers exceed targets. The experiment can now conclude with comprehensive CI/CD pipeline and validated methodology.
